title: The Khuc Family Seizing Autonomy
summary: The elder leader Khuc Thua Du skillfully regained control of the country from the Tang Dynasty without shedding blood.

slides.text: Did you know? After hundreds of years of being ruled by others, there was a very virtuous and patriotic old man named Khuc Thua Du.
slides.imagePrompt: Kind old Vietnamese leader Khuc Thua Du talking to villagers, warm atmosphere, ancient village, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: Taking advantage of the weakening Tang colonial army, he was supported by the people to take over the management of the country in 905.
slides.imagePrompt: People cheering for Khuc Thua Du as he enters the administrative center, sense of freedom and hope, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: He называл himself the Jiedushi (Tiet do su), like a talented 'steward', quietly preparing for our country to become completely independent.
slides.imagePrompt: Khuc Thua Du working at a desk with ancient scrolls, organizing the country, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: His motto was: 'Tolerant administration, simplicity, and happy people'. Thanks to him, the people's lives became much easier and happier.
slides.imagePrompt: Happy Vietnamese family in a peaceful field, sunlight, birds flying, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.question: What did Khuc Thua Du do to help the country?
How was life described under the Khuc family era?
